meta.title: Learning Resources
meta.subtitle: Curated books, podcasts, and websites to deepen your faith and fuel your growth.

books.title: The Ruthless Elimination of Hurry
books.author: John Mark Comer
books.description: How to remain emotionally healthy and spiritually alive in the chaos of the modern world.

books.title: Practicing the Way
books.author: John Mark Comer
books.description: A handbook for apprenticeship to Jesus through spiritual practices, community, and mission.

books.title: Celebration of Discipline
books.author: Richard Foster
books.description: The classic guide to the inward, outward, and corporate disciplines of the Christian life.

books.title: Simply Christian
books.author: N.T. Wright
books.description: A compelling invitation into the heart of what Christianity is all about and why it matters.

books.title: The King Jesus Gospel
books.author: Scot McKnight
books.description: Recovering the original gospel as the story of Jesus completing Israel's narrative.

books.title: The Blue Parakeet
books.author: Scot McKnight
books.description: Rethinking how we read the Bible by learning to listen to God's voice in every part of the story.

books.title: How (Not) to Read the Bible
books.author: Dan Kimball
books.description: Making sense of the strange, troublesome, and misunderstood parts of Scripture.

books.title: The Return of the Prodigal Son
books.author: Henri Nouwen
books.description: A spiritual meditation on homecoming, forgiveness, and God's unconditional love through Rembrandt's painting.

books.title: Surprised by Hope
books.author: N.T. Wright
books.description: Rethinking heaven, the resurrection, and the mission of the church.

books.title: The Familiar Stranger
books.author: Tyler Staton
books.description: Re-introducing the Holy Spirit to those in search of an experiential spirituality.

books.title: From Genesis to Junia
books.author: Preston Sprinkle
books.description: An honest search for what the Bible really says about women in leadership.

podcasts.title: The Bible Project
podcasts.description: Exploring the biblical story from beginning to end through conversations and visual media.

podcasts.title: Theology in the Raw
podcasts.description: Preston Sprinkle explores theology, culture, and all the things that make people uncomfortable.

podcasts.title: Exploring My Strange Bible
podcasts.description: Tim Mackie shares insights from years of studying and teaching the Bible.

podcasts.title: Ask NT Wright Anything
podcasts.description: World-renowned Bible scholar NT Wright answers listener questions on faith, theology, and life.

podcasts.title: Holy Post Podcast
podcasts.description: Phil Vischer and friends explore faith, media, and culture with insight and humor.

websites.title: BibleProject
websites.description: Visual Bible exploration through animated videos, podcasts, and study tools that walk through every book of the Bible.

websites.title: Breadle
websites.description: Fun daily bible verse memorization tool. New verse drops daily at midnight. Worldle meets memorization.
